Opcode.name: PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_SET_PRODUCT_STATUS
Opcode.Doc: This opcode is called in the following cases: 1.When the status of an account or service that owns the product is changed. 2.When only the product status is to changed.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object action was applied to

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service object action was applied to

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SESSION_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Session object - session in which event took place - null means none

String.name: PIN_FLD_DESCR
String.Doc: Event description - free text for application to describe event

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Start time - Timestamp of when event started (Portal Time).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: End time - Timestamp of when event ended (Portal Time). This field is used to determine which billing cycle the event is part of.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_STATUSES
Array.Doc: Status array. There can only be 1 element, hence the recid is arbitrary.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_OFFERING_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Uniquely identifies a product in an account.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_STATUS
Enum.Doc: New status. The legal values are: - PIN_PRODUCT_STATUS_ACTIVE, - PIN_PRODUCT_STATUS_INACTIVE, - PIN_PRODUCT_STATUS_CANCELLED.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_STATUS_FLAGS
Int.Doc: New status flags. Each flag is a reason for the account/service entry to be inactive.The legal values are: - PIN_STATUS_FLAG_ACTIVATE (future activate date, acct only) - PIN_STATUS_FLAG_DEBT (outstanding debt, acct only) - PIN_STATUS_FLAG_MANUAL (via admin operator) - PIN_STATUS_FLAG_DUE_TO_ACCOUNT (close all related services on account, acct only) - PIN_STATUS_FLAG_DUE_TO_PARENT (close all sub-ordinate accounts if the parent is closed) - PIN_STATUS_FLAG_PO_EXHAUSTED (via PO Mgmt System) - PIN_STATUS_FLAG_PROVISIONING (via Provisioning System)

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: Since only one event object is created by this call, only one element will be returned. The element-id is not significant.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
